entities.description: known for their intelligence and vocal skills, with distinct markings called 'points,' which are the areas of coloration on their face, ears, feet, and tail
entities.name: Siamese

entities.description: beautiful, long fur coats, can come in almost any color, have a flat face, and are prone to a variety of diseases, including renal and cardiac problems
entities.name: Persian

entities.description: large stature, thick fur coat, gentle giant, great hunters, and have polydactylism, or extra toes
entities.name: Maine Coon

entities.description: docile temperament, tend to go limp when picked up, have distinctive blue eyes, and dog-like personalities
entities.name: Ragdoll

entities.description: wild-looking cats, domesticated, talkative, require a lot of exercise, and have beautiful patterns from the Asian leopard cat
entities.name: Bengal

entities.description: distinctive ruddy agouti coat, tall, pointy ears, wedge-shaped head, slender and muscular body, active, curious, and playful
entities.name: Abyssinian

entities.description: color-pointed cat, blue eyes, medium-long coat, no undercoat, fun, social, and love attention from their chosen person
entities.name: Birman

entities.description: slender cat, green eyes, many color patterns and colors, prone to skin cancer and getting cold due to lack of fur
entities.name: Oriental Shorthair

entities.description: unique, lack of fur, social, active, dog-like felines, playful, and goofy
entities.name: Sphynx

entities.description: unique, wavy hair, soft short hair, slender bodies, enormous ears, playful, active, and trainable
entities.name: Devon Rex

entities.description: color pointed, bred from crossing Persians and Siamese, love attention and affection, sweet personalities, and playful
entities.name: Himalayan

entities.description: intelligent, shorthaired feline, round face, short ears, gentle nature, great companion for families with children or other pets
entities.name: American Shorthair
